zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond IV de Toulouse於1045年出生時，他的父親Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III48歲，母親Almodis de La Marché25歲。他於大約1064年與fille de Provence結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1105年在利比亞t阿拉布盧斯的黎波里享年60歲，埋葬在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond IV de Toulouse于1045年出生时，他的父亲Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III48岁，母亲Almodis de La Marché25岁。他于大约1064年与fille de Provence结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1105年在利比亚t阿拉布盧斯的黎波里享年60岁，埋葬在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toulouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Camile, Emile, Gilles, Marcel, Rosaire.

French and English: habitational name from Toulouse, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, most notably the city in Haute-Garonne, the capital of this French department and of the region of Occitanie.

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond IV de Toulouse was born in 1045, his father, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, was 48 and his mother, Almodis de La Marché, was 25. He married fille de Provence about 1064. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1105, in Tripoli, Ţarābulus, Libya, at the age of 60, and was buried in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond IV de Toulouse est né en 1045, son père, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Almodis de La Marché, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé fille de Provence environ 1064. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1105, à Tripoli, Ţarābulus, Libye, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond IV de Toulouse 1045 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III 48 und seine Mutter Almodis de La Marché 25. Er hat um 1064 fille de Provence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1105 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Tripoli, Ţarābulus, Libyen und wurde in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond IV de Toulouse è nato il nel 1045, il suo padre, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Almodis de La Marché, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato fille de Provence circa 1064. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1105, nel Tripoli, Ţarābulus, Libia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele.

ja.lifeSummary: Raymond IV de Toulouseが1045年に生まれた時，父Pons Guillaume de Toulouse IIIは48歳，母Almodis de La Marchéは25歳であった。約1064年にfille de Provenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1105年にリビアtアルaブルストリポリで60歳で死去し，イスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raymond IV de Toulouse(이)가 1045년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Almodis de La Marché(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1064년 fille de Provence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1105년 리비아 t아a버루스 트리폴리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond IV de Toulouse nasceu em 1045, seu pai, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Almodis de La Marché, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com fille de Provence aproximadamente 1064. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1105, em Tripoli, Ţarābulus, Líbia, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond IV de Toulouse родился в 1045 г., его отцу по имени Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Almodis de La Marché, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени fille de Provence около 1064 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1105 г. в местности триполи, tарaбулус, Ливия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymond IV de Toulouse nació en 1045, su papá, Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Almodis de La Marché, tenía 25 años. Se casó con fille de Provence aproximadamente 1064. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1105, en Tripoli, Ţarābulus, Libia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.
